seoTitle: Design a Real Estate Facebook Ad in Canva
metaDescription: Learn how to design a Facebook ad post in Canva for real estate listings, using templates, colors, and layout tips that grab attention.
intro: Real estate listings compete for attention in a crowded Facebook feed, so a well-designed ad can make the difference in engagement and leads. Canva's ad templates give real estate agents a fast way to produce professional-looking graphics without hiring a designer. This guide covers the process.

steps.heading: Choose a Facebook ad template
steps.body: Search Canva for real estate or Facebook ad templates sized correctly for the platform.

steps.heading: Add property photos
steps.body: Insert high-quality photos of the listing, choosing the most eye-catching angle for the main image.

steps.heading: Include key listing details
steps.body: Add price, location, and standout features as short, easy-to-read text overlays.

steps.heading: Apply your brand colors and logo
steps.body: Match the design to your agency's branding so the ad is instantly recognizable.

steps.heading: Export for Facebook Ads Manager
steps.body: Download the design in the correct dimensions and upload it directly to your Facebook ad campaign.

faq.question: What size should a Facebook ad image be?
faq.answer: Canva's Facebook ad templates are pre-sized to Meta's recommended dimensions, so you don't need to calculate it yourself.

faq.question: Can I create multiple listing ads quickly?
faq.answer: Yes, duplicate your template and swap in new photos and details for each property.

faq.question: Do I need design experience to make a real estate ad in Canva?
faq.answer: No, starting from a template means you mostly just replace photos and text.

faq.question: Can I animate the ad for more engagement?
faq.answer: Yes, Canva supports simple animations and video ad formats if you want more motion than a static image.
